text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: A fan letter has arrived for<n>Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Omigosh! A fan letter? For me?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Are you sure I can have this? I<n>mean, I'm no
lucky charm myself.<n>Should someone like me
really take<n>this honor?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hehe, then I guess I'll take it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fan letters are mystical relics that can<n>endow one
with the most miraculous<n>of boons! I must give
praise right<n>away!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Upon saying this, she retreats into the<n>corner of
my office to pray over the<n>letter.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I give thanks! Please continue to<n>watch over this
pitiful self of mine!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite the scene at hand, it looks<n>like the fan
support has boosted her<n>spirits.
